scripts.start: node --input-type=module --eval "import express from 'express'; import { config } from './src/config.js'; const app = express(); app.use(express.static('public')); app.listen(config.port, config.host, () => console.log(`yt-ringtone listening on http://${config.host}:${config.port}`));"
scripts.test: node --input-type=module --eval "import fs from 'node:fs'; const required = ['src/config.js', 'public/index.html', 'public/styles.css', 'public/app.js']; for (const file of required) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error(`Missing required scaffold file: ${file}`); }"
